_note: PHASE 0 - LIVE calibration (v2 spec set). A single gorgo-2d fleet drives production-representative load (c=64, L40S:2 x3 regions) on the normal chat path. The proxy fits the physical rates online by least squares over each request: ttft_ms ~ per-replica intercept + prefill_rate*uncached + queue_rate*queued_tokens_at_dispatch (the per-replica intercept absorbs RTT + fixed overhead so queue/RTT don't contaminate prefill_rate). Uses only proxy-measured TTFT + the proxy's queued-token counter -- NO engine meta_info. The sequencer harvests the converged rates and patches them into the tuning + eval phases; the prefill_rate/queue_rate below are sane defaults (the v14 calibration result: P~=0.057 ms/uncached-tok, Q~=0.008 ms/queued-tok) used only if calibration is skipped. Window: apr5 16:15-16:45 (decoded high-diversity).

auto_tune._note: calibrate mode: accumulate online regression sufficient-stats and fit prefill_rate/queue_rate from proxy-measured TTFT + queued_tokens as requests complete; does NOT modify live weights (apply=false). Sequencer reads the converged rates from the proxy at phase end.
